description_long: This projector features a compact, rectangular body with a predominantly white exterior accented by black and dark gray elements. The front section houses a prominent, hexagonal lens assembly that extends outward, encased in a black frame. The sides of the projector display large, dark panels, likely for ventilation or aesthetic contrast, while the top surface is smooth with a single dark square panel, possibly for branding or access. The rear is flat and unadorned except for a central dark panel, suggesting a minimalistic design. The overall construction appears robust, with clean lines and a modern, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments. The materials suggest a combination of plastic and glass, with some metallic internal components.
description: A modern, compact projector with a white body, black hexagonal lens housing, and dark side panels, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hexagonal black lens assembly protruding from the white body, with a flat, minimalistic surface.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a large, dark rectangular panel and the elongated lens housing extending from the main body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a flat white surface with a central dark square panel, lacking visible ports or controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, with a matching dark panel and the lens housing visible in profile.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Large dark panels on both sides may serve as ventilation, but no distinct vents, grills, or perforations are visible.
